data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. ATHENA LEGEND comes off an average run last start when fifth at this track over 450m behind Valkyrie Legend (26.27). Has ability and can bounce back. 6. INFATUATED is a 12 start maiden who has placed four times, the latest finishing in the minor money again when second at this track. Gave a huge sight last time and went down narrowly. Overdue and expected to feature again. 1. ARCANE LEGEND turned in a moderate performance last time when eighth at this track over 450m behind Zipping Richie (26.30) in a Maiden. Has the ability to give this a shake. 2. SCOTT ALIFEROUS should be thereabouts.","runners":[4,6,1,2],"exclusive":false}
